resources.string: Keeps Spotify going through brief ignition-mode pauses.
Only act while Android Auto is connected
Only act after a phone charging-power change (safer, but may miss the pause)
A second Pause within 8 seconds is always respected. Playback ending or Spotify stopping is never restarted.
Media monitor disconnected; Android was asked to reconnect it

After Spotify has played continuously for four seconds, DrivePlay Keeper treats the next Pause as the car’s ignition pause and sends Play once. If someone presses Pause again within eight seconds, that second pause is treated as intentional. Protection resets when playback is deliberately started again.\n\nKeep “Only act while Android Auto is connected” enabled for normal use. Try the power-change option only if the phone briefly stops or starts charging when the engine starts.
